posts.author: Phill (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Anyone else seeing the Integrations Center like this? I have never been able to see the captions, only the colored rectangles. Running Microsoft Edge 41.16299.1419.0 on a Windows 10 Enterprise V 1709 OS Build 16299.1451

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Phill

Can you please send us an email to support@monday.com? I want to treat this as a bug and we have a dedicated response time over there!
